segments.en: How TAGRA works – Tachograph Data Management
Learn how TAGRA works: download data from your tachograph, evaluate driving times and rest periods, archive everything automatically. Free 30-day trial.
How TAGRA works – Tachograph Data Management
TAGRA helps transport companies stay compliant with EU tachograph regulations. Free 30-day trial.
From downloading your tachograph data to legally compliant evaluation and archiving — TAGRA handles the whole process.
to your tachograph and driver cards. Data is transferred to your PC in minutes.
TAGRA automatically analyses driving times, breaks, rest periods and working time against EU 561/2006 and the Working Time Directive.
All data is stored and archived automatically. Reports are ready for any authority inspection at any time.
These are not recommendations — they are legal obligations under EU Regulation 561/2006. Missing a deadline puts you at risk of fines.
Driver card data must be downloaded at least every 28 days. TAGRA tracks deadlines and alerts you in advance.
Vehicle unit data must be downloaded at least every 90 days. All data must be archived for a minimum of 1 year.
Try free, then activate inside the software
Download the installer from tdt.cz. Windows only. No registration required.
Use the full software for up to 30 days with your real data. No limitations.
Inside the software, select the version matching your number of vehicles (1, 2, 4, 6 or MAX).
Pay online by QR code or transfer. Licence is issued instantly. Continue in the same environment.
Windows · No credit card · No registration
TAGRA Trucker works the same way — for your driver card
Just plug in the included USB reader, insert your card, and TAGRA reads everything automatically.
Professional tachograph analysis software. Driver card download, digital tachograph analysis, EU drivers' hours and HGV Working Time Directive. Developed by Truck Data Technology, s.r.o.

ld: How to manage tachograph data with TAGRA
Step-by-step process: download data from your tachograph, evaluate driving times and rest periods, archive everything automatically.
Connect the driver card or tachograph to your computer and download the data using the integrated card reader or download box.
TAGRA evaluates driving times, breaks and rest periods against EU 561/2006 regulations, the Working Time Directive and AETR.
All data is automatically archived in compliance with the legally required retention period.
